text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This may be small comfort, but I know that you
tried your best.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The opportunity to broaden my knowledge of the
world has been reward enough.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And besides, these claw machines seem more
difficult than I anticipated. Many have surely
experienced the same frustration.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's a shame so few will get their hands on these
plushies. I would love to see them spread
throughout the world...
